case_title: NEIL ANDREW MCGOVERN VS. TIMOTHY LUYEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.00) SERVED JUN-04-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUYEN, TIMOTHY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MCGOVERN, NEIL ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT LUYEN, TIMOTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER : CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF NEIL ANDREW MCGOVERN DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY LUYEN APPEARED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
